3001930.name: Dungeon Nights
3001930.description:
The New Action Dungeon Game.

The Player has to fight and defeat the Dark Lord's army in order to save the world. This is a Action Game where objective is to defeat the Dark Lord within 100 nights. It's first person combat is one of the next gen combat systems that give the player an experience like no other.

• World

The world of Dungeon Nights is filled with beautiful and thrilling adventure like the Dwarf Mines, Goblin Village, Kingdom Capital, and Battle Grounds.

• Gameplay

The first person combat of this game is unique and fast paced keeping you on the edge all the time. You will have to learn enemy attack and use that to defeat the enemies.

• Story

As the Player, you were lured into a dungeon dimension where the Dark Lord's plans to use the player body as a vessel . You have a 100 nights to defeat the Dark Lord and save the world. If you fail the Dark Lord will take over your body
3001930.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
